T0.note: Test infra unblock: e2e global-setup now uses unique email per run.

T7.note: marker_notifications key omitted; table was dropped in 20260503080000.

T8.note: Initial design used SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY; superseded by T22 worker-secret pattern. Ops provisions R2_WORKER_SECRET now.

T10.note: ConfirmDeleteDialogComponent approach (b) standalone wrapper around PrimeNG Dialog.

T12.note: super-admin-agencies kept its bespoke dialog (tenant_count guard); company-detail and asset-detail had no entity-delete affordance.

T13.note: Surfaced 4 behavior discrepancies: tenant_owner needs explicit space_members for archive/restore; platform_admin same; anon hits 42501 not 28000; create_space auto-adds caller as space_members.owner.

T17.note: Caught critical bug in ConfirmDeleteDialogComponent footer template (pTemplate footer -> #footer). T10/T12 dialog was non-functional until this fix.

T18.note: Flagged DB-level bug in tenant-cascade self-protection guard; flagged uncategorized UI gap in trial-detail template; flagged pre-existing flake in grid-filtering-assets.

followups: DB bug: enforce_space_member_guards raises last-owner error during tenants -> spaces -> space_members cascade. Cascade-flag GUC does not propagate through statement-level FK cascades. Needs separate spec.
UI gap: trial-detail.component.ts renders raw therapeutic_areas.name instead of using resolveTherapeuticAreaLabel from display-fallbacks. Touch-up needed for (uncategorized) badge.
Pre-existing flake: grid-filtering-assets.spec.ts clear-all-resets-toolbar test times out. Unchanged on this branch.
Stale doc: CLAUDE.md mentions tenant_members.role owner|member but 20260429010000 pinned it to owner only.

Ops: provision R2_WORKER_SECRET in Cloudflare via wrangler secret put. The matching vault entry r2_drain_worker_secret defaults to a local-dev placeholder; production must rotate via vault.create_secret('<random>', 'r2_drain_worker_secret').
EventsPageComponent.onDeleteEvent defined but no template entry point. Pre-existing wiring gap surfaced during T17.
